reviews.title: Size down 1/2 a size
reviews.text: I was a new runner 2 years ago and after much research bought a pair of 1080 v10's.  They immediately reduced the pain I felt when running.  Here I am 1 1/2 years later and in need of a new pair of shoes so I bought these 1080 v12's.  What can I say, they're even better than my v10's.  The only catch was I had to size down 1/2 a size from my normal shoe size.  Once I made that tweak the shoe fit amazingly and I'm off and running again.

reviews.title: Good show, but I can't really run in them...
reviews.text: The fit is right, the sole is not so much right for me.  *For ME* too stiff, too soft, I'm not sure, but the pain set in after a half-mile on a 4 mile run. I had to turn around and cut my run short - my feet hurt.

reviews.title: walking on a cloud comfy
reviews.text:
I was looking for a comfortable all-purpose walking, going to work shoe. NB version 11 has more subdued colors. But they brought me v12 out since they didn't have my sizes left. I was hooked as I tried them on. They are the most comfy shoe I ever used, better than any Nike air, better than the walking co. store orthopedic shoes. These were just super soft. The size is what I usually wear if there is no wide version.

Seem breathable, I got the navy blue with orange trims. I think it looks fine, not into the flashy color. I switch to office shoes when I am in the office.

The only issue is the price is very high. This is my first ever new balance, I always thought they were just another running shoe brand, but man the fresh foam is the most cloud-like soles. I only had it for a few weeks, so not sure how long they will last. I usually wear Merrell an outdoor brand, they don't seem to last very long tho.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: I’ve only taken them for a couple of “rides”, but they seem to work like they should. I put oil on the wheels as directed before first time use. Seemed easier to use the second time as the oil had time to dry. Pretty great and looks good too. I did get the wrong size tho, but somehow still fit

reviews.title: My daughter loves them.
reviews.text: Perhaps my daughter is heavy-footed or something because, when she walks around with these things on, it's so loud. Clank clank clank clank... from the wheels hitting the ground with each step....Reason for the 4 star rating. Other than that, these are great! Seem very sturdy and they operate well. My daughter loves them. She normally wears a size 8.5/9 in women's shoes. The size 42 fits her just fine.

reviews.title: Difficult for me to use
reviews.text: The shoes were cute! They are heavy and clunky, but they definitely looked good! The wheels are far back on the foot, so balancing is hard with the skates out, which put a lot of stress on my calves. For those worried about buying them and paying return shipping if they don't work: Amazon will cover return shipping. The seller sent me a return address and I paid $20 or so to return it to their Cali location. Amazon refunded it to me as a credit that only works on products sold/shipped by amazon (must be both!). I might be weak in the legs, so it could be different for someone else if you want to try it.

title: Skechers Men's Max Cushioning Premier Vantage-Performance Walking & Running Shoe Sneaker
description: Add more cushioned comfort and response to your run with the Skechers Max Cushioning Premier™. A cushioned comfort running and walking design on an ULTRA GO® cushioned platform. The company's success stems from it's high quality, diversified, and affordable product line that meets consumers' Various lifestyle needs. Since it's inception in 1992, the Skechers diverse product offering has grown from utility style boots to include seven Skechers brands and five uniquely branded fashion lines for men and women. Skechers is an award-winning global leader in lifestyle footwear offering shoes that appeal to trend-savvy men, women and kids everywhere. The brand's styles include the latest innovative athletic, casual and fashion sneakers as well as sandals and boots—with many collections featuring Skechers air-cooled memory foam insoles for added comfort. Plus, Skechers offers a range of slip-resistant work FOOTWEAR for men and women, as well as cool, fun, playful and lighted styles that boys and girls love. Always ahead of the fashion curve, Skechers has made its sport, casual and dress casual shoes essential to every closet.
features: fabric-and-synthetic
Imported
Man Made sole
Shaft measures approximately mid-top from arch
Add more cushioned comfort and response to your run with the Skechers Max Cushioning Premier. A cushioned comfort running and walking design on an ULTRA GO cushioned platform.

UPPER: Virtually seamless engineered mesh fabric upper provides breathability and comfort. Synthetic hot-melt overlays at toe, heel and laces for added stability. Lace up front. Side S logo. Contrast colored midsole trim and detail.
MIDSOLE CUSHION: Cushioned responsive ULTRA GO comfort platform. INSOLE CUSHION: Air Cooled Goga Mat running insole for cooling comfort.

OUTSOLE/BOTTOM: Lightweight, durable and flexible parametric web outsole provides multi-surface traction. Forefoot flex grooves aid in flexibility and promote a smooth transition. Mid-foot strike zone promotes efficiency in each stride.
MACHINE WASHABLE shoe design - wash on gentle cycle cold, hang to air dry. WEIGHT: 10.4 oz. per shoe in a men's size 9. OFFSET: 6mm heel drop height. HEEL: 2 inch heel height.

Don't but these shoes as they will wear out in just a few months.

title: EZ-STIK 13.1 Half Marathon Decal Sticker 6" 5k 10k Running Shoes runnerA010
description: There is no background color. The surface that you apply the sticker to will become your background color. This will be a single color sticker. This is a DIE-CUT vinyl decal meaning that the background has been trimmed off. If there is a background color in the picture, it is used only as a representation. The background color will be the surface color you place the sticker on (or clear if you put it on a window). The decal will come with clear transfer tape, so you can easily apply it to anything you like (walls, windows, cars, mailbox, mirrors, laptops, etc etc etc). I use PREMIUM Oracal brand vinyl for all decals. Application is relatively easy. Your decal will come as THREE pieces - the backing paper, the sticker itself, and the clear transfer tape. Make sure you are applying to a CLEAN surface. You carefully pull the clear transfer tape up from the backing paper, making sure that it pulls the sticker up with it (if it does not, then firmly press down on it with a squee-gee or credit card or something similar until it sticks properly to the clear transfer tape). Then you apply the sticker and clear transfer tape to whatever surface you would like the decal on. You then use a squee-gee or credit card or something similar to firmly press down once again, making sure that the sticker STICKS, and then you carefully and slowly remove the clear transfer tape from the top, leaving behind only the sticker. I have found that on some surfaces (especially walls and wood surfaces), it helps to leave the clear transfer tape on for awhile to make sure everything is sticking well before removing it. I do not issue refunds or exchanges on vinyl decals. Please understand this before you bid. Some decals are more difficult to apply than others (especially the little ones!) - likewise, some surfaces are more difficult to apply decals to.
features: Easy to Apply

title: Brooks Women’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Purchased these gaiters for our hike through the Grand Canyon. Didn't install the velcro strap and it still worked wonders. My wife had the Outdoor Research version with a sole strap and was more frustrated due to that strap unlatching constantly....and this is half the price. I cant speak against its durability with abbrasions or water resistance. It feels as though it would be very helpful if caught in a rainstorm.

I should add I wore the L size over Salomon 4d Quest (size 11) with a lot of room to spare.

reviews.title: Secure but difficult to remove
reviews.text: Decent gaiters. Front lace hook is 'upside down'; you have to slide it in UNDER the lace. Good design for being secure, but let me tell you, it is a pain in the rear to take them off.

reviews.title: Lived up and exceeded expectations
reviews.text: We weren’t expecting as much snow on the trail today kept my upper sock area more warm and dry then without. I was really surprised. Super comfortable.

reviews.title: Gaiters a Hikers Best Friend
reviews.text: I purchased these gaiters for my Bug out Bag Gear. I am very happy with these gaiters! they seem to have good quality, as far as construction, and seem to be well made. It's a Hikers Find. I would Recommend these, and they are a little cheaper than Dirty Girl Gaiters. I am considering another purchase in the future, as I feel having more than one pair to change out the dirty ones in between laundering is a smart move. The patterns are limited and also color choices, but it's functionality is whats more important! I haven't put them on trail or hiking as of yet, but I intend to in the future!

reviews.title: Gaiters keep sand out of shoes
reviews.text: I super glued the velcro to the heel of my shoes as directed, secured my new gaiters and went on a multi-day hike, frequently in sand. The gaiters did a marvelous job of keeping the sand and debris out of my shoes. Also, they are packed really small to stash in my backpack when not in use. I would recommend these gaiters.

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

reviews.title: Great for wide feet!
reviews.text: My son has bilateral clubbed feet, and he no longer wears braces but has a wide foot. New balance is the only brand that works for him. This particular model is perfect for him!

reviews.title: The best for extra wide feet
reviews.text: These shoes are perfect for my special needs child. He has extra wide feet and he has trouble with shoe tying.

reviews.title: Reviews are right about the quality
reviews.text: Wish I read the reviews more carefully. I’m so desperate to find shoes that fits my boys’ wide feet that I just assumed NB would be good because I’ve gotten them in the past. But no the quality is sub par. They are already falling apart and it’s only been 1.5 months. I’ll probably have to buy them new shoes soon which is a shame because it’s not like these are some off brand cheapies. You expect more from a company like NB.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: These New Balance shoes are great. The insoles are so comfortable and I know that my little one is getting the protection that she needs for her growing feet. The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Maybe I just got a defective pair of shoes...
reviews.text: The insoles don’t fit the shoes, nor were they glued in. So they kept sliding out. Nice looking shoe from a distance but they are falling apart.

title: New Balance Women's 430 V1 Running Shoe
description:
Two layers of cushioning support deliver a plush ride in the 430 women's running shoe from New Balance. Mesh on the durable leather upper breathes as your run heats up.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 100% Leather

title: NORTIV 8 Men's Cushioned Trail Running Shoes Rubber Sole Non Slip Lightweight Lace Up Walking Shoe
features: Imported
Rubber sole
Breathable Upper: These men’s trail running shoes are built with a mesh fabric upper, ensuring maximum air circulation for all-day freshness.
Cushioned Footsteps: Designed with a lightweight and shock-absorbent MD midsole, these casual sneakers power each step, reducing impact and pressure on the feet.
Safe Design: These shoes feature reflective strips on the upper, keeping you walking or running more safely in the dark.
Greater Stability: These casual shoes boast a textured and patterned rubber oustole for greater wear-resistance and stability. Run or walk with ease in the park or on roads.
Optimum Comfort: A mesh-covered PU insole and padded collar bring cushioning and added comfort, suitable for everyday wear, sport, casual walks and beyond.

reviews.title: Solid looking hiking trail running shoes
reviews.text: These are nice looking, solid, strong and sturdy trail running shoes. Feel comfortable while trail-walking or running. Only advice is buy a half size bigger. 9.5 usually fits me well but this one was tight and Inhad to go for size 10

reviews.title: Nice running shoes
reviews.text: Good fit. Nice comfortable shoe. Works great

reviews.title: Runs a bit small, but a pretty average shoe, otherwise
reviews.text: I'll keep this pretty short: the shoe is serviceable; that's about it. It's neither particularly comfortable or uncomfortable; it's just a shoe with no outstanding qualities, pretty comparable in quality and feel to the $20 shoes you'd get at "the blue and yellow store". Mine ran on the small side, about a half size under, I would say, but they fit (without cramming my toes in), so I'll use them for outdoor work come spring and summer.

title: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal Jogging Running Shoes Run Choose Size & Color (V29) (6.25" X 3.75", Blue)
description: This vinyl decal is made of high quality indoor/outdoor rated and proven Oracal 651 vinyl!! -These are perfect for car windows, skateboards, Ipads, etc. (Practically any smooth, clean surface) -A vinyl cut sticker means that there is no background or clear backing. Only the image is the adhesive part! -These are not Cling-ons. -Please apply only to a clean, dry surface. Below are some instructions on how to apply these cool stickers: Step 1 Rub the sticker with a credit card or something with a rigid surface to be sure the transfer tape is properly adhered to the sticker. Step 2 Clean and dry the desired area. Stickers will stick best to clean smooth surfaces. Step 3 Remove the paper backing slowly making sure the sticker stays adhered to the transparent transfer tape Step 4 Carefully position the sticker to the desired area. Once the sticker sticks it will be nearly impossible to reposition without destroying the sticker. Rub the sticker from one side to the other, eliminating any air bubbles. Step 5 Use a hard edged object like a credit card to make sure the entire sticker is fully adhered to the surface. Step 6 Slowly remove the transfer tape. Making sure no part of the sticker remains on the transfer tape. Step 7 Check for air bubbles. In most cases air bubbles can be worked to the edge of the sticker, but if not, a pin hole will allow the air out and become virtually invisible, once the bubble is gone. That’s it! Your sticker is now worry free. It will last through rain, sleet, snow and gentle washing's. You can remove the sticker from glass surfaces with a razor blade or in most cases a fingernail will get the removal process started.
features: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal
26.2 Marathon Girl Vinyl Sticker

reviews.title: Just what I wanted
reviews.text: Love it! Went on perfectly. I’ve had these before and after normal wear and tear they chip off but so far so good!

reviews.title: I Earned This!
reviews.text: So glad I got this! I ran my 1st marathon CIM in Sacramento.  I heard that people had their 26.2 CIM magnets stolen.  So I saw this. It was very easy to put on. I followed the instructions and have not had any issues after going through many car washes.  Makes me smile every time I see it on my back windshield!  I'm glad I got this!!!

reviews.title: Marathon runner must haves
reviews.text: My husband gifted this to me after my Marathon! I love ‘me. I have it in the back of my work laptop and every time I look at it it brings a big smile on my face :) this is beautiful/classy and easy to install.

reviews.title: Easy & Perfect!
reviews.text:
This was so easy to transfer. No issues at all. In retrospect, I wish I had placed it on the other side of the window, but no big deal.

I cleaned the glass and dried it and rubbed the transfer sheet with a credit card as instructed. No issues! Easily transferred to the glass and looks Great!

Great value for $4.99 and was securely shipped in an envelope/arrived quickly!

reviews.title: Like this very much
reviews.text: Like this very much. Also purchased the 13.1 sticker. One is on my car one is hanging where I can see it in my house as my next goal

Great shoe! My kiddo loves these. They are a good quality and fit perfect!
These are wayyyy better quality than anything Walmart has for a low price. I think they are a happy medium between Walmart and sketchers brand shoes. Considering how fast my kiddos go through sneakers I need quality and cheaper

reviews.title: hobibear boys shoe
reviews.text: 5 year old grandson chose these shoes online and loves them.  They are easy on and off... quite bright in color.  The sizing was spot on for us.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Great kid shoes
reviews.text: Super cute shoes. I bought these for two of my girls and they’ve been wearing them all spring and loving them. If you don’t know what size to buy you should purchase a shoe sizer for home. I bought one years ago and I’m able to size my kids feet easily and accurately.the sizes of these shoes were spot on.

reviews.title: Kids like these
reviews.text:
My grandsons love these kind of shoes.
Kids go through shoes sooooo fast. Also, the fact they don't have to tie their shoes is convenient

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Both two pairs for my boys and they love it. Their new favorite twinning shoes.

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: My new favorite running shoe.
reviews.text: Perfect fit right out of the box.  Wonderful cushioned run and very light weight.  Well made and no signs of wear even after several long runs.  Wide enough toe box to prevent any rubbing.  True to size.

reviews.title: BROOKS ARE The BEST SHOES HANDS DOWN
reviews.text: Nothing to dislike light durable great for weightlifting

reviews.title: Get what you pay for
reviews.text:
I sent these back after trying on. They look longer than they are when on your feet, I assume it’s due to the design. Didn’t have the best feel and overall a great name but bad shoe.
I’d go with a better brooks or On Clouds

reviews.title: Very light and comfortable
reviews.text: Nice and light and comfortable which was what I wanted. I love how well they fit. Good price, too, for the quality.
